title: diplazium fauriei var. tenuifolium
intro: Diplazium fauriei var. tenuifolium, also known as Korean rock fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Korea and Japan. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Diplazium fauriei var. tenuifolium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat a range of ailments.
